The project is in a Red status because more than 10 % of tasks have slipped past baseline, with 64 % of tasks behind schedule and the worst task 81 days late in Phase 2 P2P.

stats.history_depth_note: Only one weekly snapshot has been recorded so far for this portfolio, so week-over-week trend movement cannot be computed yet — insights below are based on the current cross-project snapshot. headline: Both Zycus S2P projects are in red health, with significant schedule delays and a high blocker count, indicating urgent corrective action is required.
trend_bullets: Both projects are red with >10% task delays
Average schedule variance of -41.5 days signals widespread lag
Workshop-related blockers dominate the blocker list (4 instances)
Titan project shows a perception gap and 0.7 milestone completion rate
emerging_risks: Unresolved blockers (301 total) could stall critical deliverables
Schedule lag of 81 days on Titan may push go‑live beyond target
Perception gap in Titan risks stakeholder disengagement
Negative sentiment may erode trust and lead to scope creep
recommendations: Schedule a cross‑functional workshop to triage and resolve the 301 open blockers
Allocate additional resources to Titan to accelerate backlog and reduce 81‑day delay
Implement a weekly milestone review cadence to monitor progress
Engage Titan stakeholders in a perception alignment session to close the gap
